Book Appointment

The art of beauty. The precision of healing.

Learn more

About

Artisan Clinic is a modern plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine clinic in Warsaw. Our name is no coincidence — it derives from two words that are important to us: art, meaning beauty, and sanatio, meaning healing. Artisan is a name that reflects our sense of aesthetics, harmony, beauty, precision, and respect for the patient's health.

We perform highly specialized plastic surgery procedures, including:
- deep plane face lifting,
- rhinoplasty,
- abdominoplasty,
- breast augmentation,
- eyelid surgery,
- neck lift,
- ear correction.

We also perform surgical oncology procedures, such as breast reconstruction.

We also offer minimally invasive aesthetic medicine procedures, including fillers, Botox, biostimulators, laser therapy, and body contouring.

Book Appointment

Services

Face

Our clinic offers a wide range of plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine procedures that help restore a youthful appearance, improve facial proportions, and enhance natural beauty.

Among the most popular procedures are:

Facial plastic surgery:
• facelift,
• rhinoplasty,
• eyelid, ear, and chin surgery.

Facial aesthetic medicine:
• Aptos thread facelift,
• facial lipofilling with stem cells.

A detailed price list for all available procedures is provided below. We invite you to explore our offer and contact our team to schedule an individual consultation.

Deep Plane Face and Neck Lift

60 000 – 85 000 PLN

Aptos Thread Facelift

14 000 PLN

Rhinoplasty – total

28 000 – 32 000 PLN

Rhinoplasty – cartilage

22 000 – 25 000 PLN

Upper Eyelid Surgery

10 000 – 12 000 PLN

Protruding Ear Correction

10 000 - 12 000 PLN
View full offer Book Appointment

Body

In this section you will find a full range of procedures focused on body contouring, improving skin condition, and treating selected conditions.

We offer procedures in the following areas:

Surgery and oncological surgery, Plastic surgery, including:
• abdominoplasty,
• arm lift,
• liposuction.

Phlebology — treatment of vein and vascular conditions, Aesthetic medicine, including modern procedures such as:
• skin tightening and shrinking with Argo Plasma technology,
• non-surgical buttock lift — Infini Filler Body.

We encourage you to review the detailed price list and contact us to schedule an individual consultation.

Liposuction – abdomen

12 000 – 16 000 PLN

Liposuction – waist

10 000 – 12 000 PLN

Thigh Lift

26 000 – 35 000 PLN

Calf Augmentation (implants)

19 000 PLN

Arm Lift

22 000 - 25 000 PLN

Skin Tightening and Shrinking – Thighs – Argo Plasma

6 000 PLN
View full offer Book Appointment

Breasts

In this section you will find a detailed price list for breast plastic surgery procedures. Our offer includes a wide range of procedures tailored to the individual needs of our patients.

We perform, among others:
• breast augmentation (implants, lipotransfer),
• breast reduction,
• breast lift and reshaping,
• breast reconstruction after mastectomy,
• gynecomastia treatment in men.

Depending on preferences and expectations regarding technique and results, we help restore or give the breasts and torso the desired shape, while maintaining natural proportions and body aesthetics.

We invite you to review the price list and consult with our specialist to choose the appropriate method.

Breast Augmentation with Implants

27 000 – 34 000 PLN

Inverted Nipple Correction

8 000 PLN

Implant Replacement (both breasts)

29 000 – 34 000 PLN

Breast Lift

27 000 – 33 000 PLN

Breast Lift with Aptos Threads (subcutaneous bra)

24 000 – 26 000 PLN

Breast Reduction (both breasts)

27 000 – 35 000 PLN
View full offer Book Appointment

Skin

In this section you will find procedures focused on rejuvenation, revitalization, and improving skin condition, as well as removal of skin lesions and correction of imperfections.

We offer effective solutions in the areas of:
• surgery — removal of moles, scars, and other skin lesions,
• aesthetic medicine — including Botox, hyaluronic acid, fillers, biostimulators,
• laser therapy — photorejuvenation, vascular closure, laser hair removal,
• body contouring treatments — e.g., Endermologie.

Our team of specialists will help select the right method for your needs and skin type to achieve a natural and harmonious result.

We encourage you to review the detailed price list and book a consultation.

Scar Correction (surgical)

od 2 200 PLN

Mole Removal

2 200 PLN

Microneedling Mesotherapy

od 800 PLN

IPL Laser Photorejuvenation – face

600 PLN

IPL Laser Photorejuvenation – neck

400 PLN

Skin Tightening and Shrinking – Argo Plasma

6 000 PLN/area
View full offer Book Appointment

  • dr n. med. Tadeusz Witwicki

    Specialist in plastic, reconstructive, and aesthetic surgery.

    He gained experience under the guidance of his parents — Dr. Zofia Witwicka, an outstanding plastic surgeon and ENT specialist, and Prof. Tadeusz Witwicki, an orthopedic surgeon.

    He studied at the Warsaw Medical Academy and completed training in Beijing, Glasgow, Los Angeles, and Ghent. He obtained his specialization in plastic surgery at the Department of Plastic Surgery of the Medical Centre of Postgraduate Education in Warsaw. His specialization supervisor was the founder of Polish plastic surgery, Prof. Michal Krauss. He regularly participates in European conferences in his field (including Paris, Rome, Milan, Stockholm, and Oslo). He has been running his own medical practice for over 20 years.

    Founding member of the Polish Society of Aesthetic Medicine and Anti-Aging. Regular member of the Polish Society of Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery, and member of the Organizing Committee of the 1st Congress of PTCHPRiE. Member of the Polish Society of Surgical Oncology.

    International APTOS Rejuvenation and Lifting Techniques Trainer, SlimLipo method instructor in Poland, conducts training for physicians in breast reconstruction.

    Author of numerous publications in plastic and reconstructive surgery.

    Meet our team

  • dr n. med. Maciej Mazurek

    Specialist in plastic surgery

    He specializes in plastic surgery of the face and breasts, particularly in advanced Deep Plane facelift procedures. He graduated from the 1st Faculty of Medicine at the Medical University of Warsaw in 2014 with honors. He completed his specialization training in plastic surgery at the West Pomeranian Center for the Treatment of Severe Burns and Plastic Surgery, as well as the Clinical Department of Plastic Surgery at CMKP in Warsaw, passing the specialization examination with distinction.

    To further expand his skills, he completed a training fellowship at one of the largest plastic surgery centers in the United Kingdom — St Andrews Centre for Plastic Surgery and Burns.

    In 2020, he defended his doctoral thesis in plastic and oncological breast surgery. This work is particularly relevant to Dr. Mazurek's clinical practice and covers the use of modern technologies in plastic surgery of the breasts, face, and abdomen.

    In his private life, he is passionate about active recreation, a healthy lifestyle, and water sports.

    Meet our team

  • dr hab. n. med. Piotr Pietruski

    Specialist in plastic and reconstructive surgery

    Dr. hab. n. med. Piotr Pietruski is a specialist in plastic surgery. He completed his medical studies at the 2nd Faculty of Medicine at the Medical University of Warsaw in 2011. In 2019, he obtained his specialization in plastic surgery, passing the state specialization examination with distinction. In 2018, he received his doctoral degree in medical sciences, and was awarded his habilitation in 2020.

    In 2023, after completing a 2-year specialization program, he became the first Polish plastic surgeon to obtain the European specialist title in oncological, reconstructive, and aesthetic breast surgery. He completed numerous clinical fellowships in Stockholm, Zurich, Ghent, Barcelona, London, as well as in Australia and the USA.

    Dr. Pietruski specializes in plastic surgery of the breasts, abdomen, and face. He places particular emphasis on preoperative patient education and makes every effort to ensure the best possible treatment outcomes.

    Meet our team

  • dr n. med. Sławomir Mazur

    Specialist in oncological surgery

    Dr. n. med. Slawomir Mazur graduated from the Faculty of Medicine at the Warsaw Medical Academy in 1984. That same year, he began working at the Institute of Oncology in Warsaw. Under the guidance of his mentor, Prof. Andrzej Kulakowski, he acquired successive surgical qualifications, including a specialization in oncological surgery.

    He currently works at the Department of Breast Cancer and Reconstructive Surgery at the Maria Sklodowska-Curie National Research Institute of Oncology in Warsaw, where he primarily performs breast reconstruction procedures. He was the first to introduce autologous adipose-derived stem cells for therapeutic tissue regeneration and breast reconstruction at the institute.

    For over 25 years, he has been collaborating with and serving as physician to the Warsaw Amazons (breast cancer survivors' association). He is directly affiliated with the Amazons Club Warsaw Centre.

    Meet our team

  • dr n. med. Justyna Jończyk

    Specialist in plastic surgery

    She is a graduate of the Wroclaw Medical University, where she gained a solid theoretical and practical foundation in medicine. Part of her studies were completed through an international exchange program at the University of Barcelona in Spain. She passed the State Medical Examination with one of the highest scores in the country.

    She completed her specialization in plastic surgery at the Department of Plastic Surgery at the University Clinical Centre in Gdansk. Her professional interests focus on breast and facial surgery, with particular emphasis on rhinoplasty, eyelid surgery, and face and neck lifting.

    In her work, she prioritizes patient safety and comfort, approaching every case with empathy and full commitment.

    Meet our team

  • dr Natalia Winiarska

    Specialist in aesthetic medicine

    A graduate of the Faculty of Medicine at the Medical University of Warsaw. Certified Aesthetic Medicine Physician. Author of scientific publications in aesthetic medicine, plastic surgery, and ophthalmology. She continuously expands her knowledge by attending training courses and scientific conferences.

    She performs regenerative procedures focused on improving skin quality, restoring its healthy appearance and radiance. She emphasizes subtle, natural results that enhance each patient's individual beauty.

    She specializes in surgical eyelid correction (blepharoplasty).

    Meet our team

  • lek. Beata Mitręga-Korab

    Specialist in general surgery, oncological surgery, and otolaryngology

    She graduated from the Faculty of Medicine at the Warsaw Medical Academy. In 1986, she completed her 1st degree specialization in general surgery, oncological surgery, and otolaryngology. Since 1997, she has been affiliated with the Centre of Oncology, Department of Head and Neck Tumors, Division of Reconstructive and Plastic Surgery.

    Dr. Beata Mitrega-Korab specializes in diagnoseing and treating skin lesions and tumors, including skin cancers and melanomas — particularly those located in the head and neck area. She specializes in performing skin grafts and reconstruction of defects using transposition skin flaps.

    Meet our team

  • dr n. med. Aleksander Grous

    Specialist in general and oncological surgery

    A graduate of the Warsaw Medical Academy (1998), Doctor of Medical Sciences, specialist in general surgery and oncological surgery. Long-time research fellow at the Warsaw Medical Academy (now the Medical University of Warsaw), as well as the Medical Centre of Postgraduate Education, and deputy head of the Department of Oncological Surgery at the European Health Centre. Academic lecturer.

    Currently a specialist at the Department of Breast Cancer and Reconstructive Surgery at the National Research Institute of Oncology in Warsaw. Scholarship recipient of the Polish Society of Surgeons at the Department of Surgery at the Medical University of Leuven, Belgium. Member of the Polish Society of Surgical Oncology.

    Meet our team

  • lek. Aleksandra Latała

    Specialist in aesthetic medicine

    Aleksandra Latala is a graduate of the Medical University of Warsaw, Faculty of Medicine, and a certified Aesthetic Medicine Physician. She continuously expands her knowledge by attending scientific conferences and training courses. In her work, the priority is skin quality and a healthy appearance — she believes that beauty begins with health.

    With dedication and precision, she creates individualized treatment plans that help her patients enjoy a natural and radiant appearance. In her private life, she is passionate about radiology, alpine skiing, tennis, and water sports.

    Meet our team
